Metadata.defaultDescription: We recreate impossible-to-find plastic replacement parts from your photos using professional 3D design and manufacturing.

home.title: Custom 3D-printed replacement parts
home.description: Broken a plastic part you can't buy anywhere? Send us photos and we recreate it with professional 3D modeling and printing. Shipped across Europe.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: From a photo of your broken part to a printed replacement at your door — here is our five-step process.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Get a free quote by email, WhatsApp or Telegram. Send us a photo of your broken part and we'll take it from there.

Hero.title: Broken plastic part?
Hero.subtitle: We recreate impossible-to-find replacement parts from photos using professional 3D design and manufacturing.
Hero.trust: No account needed · Free quote · Ships across the EU

Problem.title: When a small broken part ruins the whole thing
Problem.description: A single cracked clip, gear or bracket can make an appliance, car interior or device unusable — and the manufacturer stopped selling the spare years ago.

points.title: Discontinued & out of stock
points.description: The part is no longer produced, the model is obsolete, or it was never sold separately in the first place.

points.title: Endless searching
points.description: Weeks lost on forums and marketplaces looking for a spare that simply doesn't exist anymore.

points.title: Forced to replace everything
points.description: Without one tiny component you're told to throw away a perfectly good product and buy a new one.

HowItWorksPreview.imageAlt: A 3D printer producing orange plastic replacement parts on its build plate
HowItWorksPreview.title: From photo to printed part in five steps
HowItWorksPreview.description: A simple, transparent process. You send a few photos, we handle the engineering and manufacturing.

steps.title: Send photos of your broken part
steps.description: Take a few clear photos from different angles — including the broken area and how it connects to the rest.

steps.title: Provide measurements
steps.description: Share the key dimensions with a ruler or caliper. We'll guide you on exactly what we need for a precise fit.

steps.title: We recreate the 3D model
steps.description: Our engineers rebuild the part as a precise, manufacturable 3D CAD model and confirm the details with you.

steps.title: We print the replacement
steps.description: We 3D print your part in a durable material chosen for strength, heat and fit for its purpose.

steps.title: We ship it to you
steps.description: Your finished replacement part is carefully packed and shipped to your door anywhere in Europe.

Services.title: Everything needed to bring a part back
Services.description: A complete service from first photo to finished component — no CAD skills or equipment required on your side.

items.title: Reverse engineering & 3D modeling
items.description: We reconstruct accurate, manufacturable CAD models from photos and measurements of your original part.

items.title: Design improvements
items.description: Where the original failed, we can reinforce weak points so the replacement lasts longer than the part it replaces.

items.title: Professional 3D printing
items.description: Production in durable technical materials, with the right finish and tolerances for a proper fit.

items.title: Measurement guidance
items.description: Clear instructions on how to measure so we get dimensions right the first time, with no guesswork.

WhyUs.imageAlt: A 3D printer at work in a well-equipped workshop
WhyUs.title: Craftsmanship you can rely on
WhyUs.description: We treat every part as a small engineering project — precise, durable and fairly priced.

items.title: Precision engineering
items.description: Accurate CAD reconstruction for parts that actually fit and function.

items.title: Fast turnaround
items.description: Most projects move from quote to shipped part in a matter of days.

items.title: Transparent pricing
items.description: A clear, free quote up front — no surprises and no obligation.

items.title: Shipping across Europe
items.description: Delivered to your door in the EU, carefully packaged.

items.title: Durable materials
items.description: Technical plastics selected for strength, heat resistance and longevity.

items.title: Less waste
items.description: Repair instead of replace — keep the products you already own in service.

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.description: Everything you need to know before sending us your broken part.

items.question: What kind of parts can you recreate?
items.answer: Small and medium plastic components — clips, gears, brackets, knobs, housings, hinges and similar parts for appliances, cars, electronics and household items.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: It depends on the complexity and size of the part. Send us photos and we'll give you a free, no-obligation quote before any work begins.

items.question: What photos and measurements do you need?
items.answer: Clear photos from several angles plus the main dimensions measured with a ruler or caliper. After you contact us we'll tell you exactly what to capture.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: Most parts are modeled, printed and shipped within a few days, depending on complexity and our current queue.

items.question: Will the part be as strong as the original?
items.answer: We select durable technical materials and can reinforce weak areas, so replacements are often as strong as — or stronger than — the original.

items.question: Do you ship outside my country?
items.answer: Yes. We ship replacement parts to customers across the European Union.

Cta.title: Get your part back to life
Cta.subtitle: Send us a photo of your broken part today and receive a free quote — no account, no commitment.

Footer.tagline: We recreate impossible-to-find plastic replacement parts from your photos using professional 3D design and manufacturing.

HowItWorksPage.title: How it works
HowItWorksPage.description: From a photo of your broken part to a printed replacement at your door — five simple steps.

ContactPage.title: Let's recreate your part
ContactPage.description: Send us a photo of your broken part through your preferred channel and we'll reply with the next steps and a free quote.
ContactPage.responseNote: We usually reply within one business day. Please include clear photos and, if possible, the main measurements.

email.label: Email
email.description: Best for detailed messages and attaching several photos.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: The quickest way to share photos and chat with us directly.

telegram.label: Telegram
telegram.description: Prefer Telegram? Message us and send your photos there.
